programs.title: Last Week Tonight With John Oliver
programs.desc: Comedian John Oliver hosts an in-depth, satirical look at developments from the past seven days in news, politics and current events.

programs.title: The Bride of Frankenstein
programs.desc: After recovering from injuries sustained in the mob attack upon himself and his creation, Dr. Frankenstein (Colin Clive) falls under the control of his former mentor, Dr. Pretorius (Ernest Thesiger), who insists the now-chastened doctor resume his experiments in creating new life. Meanwhile, the Monster (Boris Karloff) remains on the run from those who wish to destroy him without understanding that his intentions are generally good despite his lack of socialization and self-control.

programs.title: The Comeback
programs.desc: Valerie tries to repair the damage caused by negative AI press and save Mark's reality show job by making an appearance on "Finance Dudes.".

programs.title: Rooster
programs.desc: Greg motivates the hockey team before a game, Katie focuses on her internship, and Archie gets feedback on his book.

programs.title: The Dark Wizard
programs.desc: With a new relationship grounding him, Dean regains emotional stability and his long-held dream of flight comes to fruition when he immerses himself in the cutting-edge world of wingsuit flying.

programs.title: Last Week Tonight With John Oliver
